# Support DSR Workflow

Support agents must classify privacy-rights requests and route them to the approved DSR queue.

Verified users may request access, deletion, correction, export, opt-out, or restriction through the DSR workflow. Agents must not disclose specific pieces of personal information until verification is complete.

Opt-out and restriction requests should be honored through the preference workflow without demanding unnecessary identity documents. Agents must not mark a request complete unless the DSR ticket or privacy tool confirms submission or completion.
